prestazioni: Engine swap to a **13B-REW** (rotary, twin-turbo, 1.3L) from a Mazda RX-7 FD3S with a **Garrett GT35R turbo** (68mm compressor, 76 trim) and **HKS GT-SS intercooler** (front-mount, 600x300x76mm core) for 400+ HP at 12 PSI on **E85 fuel**, paired with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** for sequential turbo control and full flex-fuel mapping.

Full **Mazdaspeed RX-2 chassis reinforcement** with a **Cusco 6-point roll cage** (bolt-in, mild steel, 2.5mm wall thickness) and **Hardrace adjustable front/rear camber plates** (for 12x1.5 stud pattern) to handle increased torque and weight transfer under hard launches.

Drivetrain upgrade with a **PPG 5-speed dog engagement gearset** (close-ratio, 2.33:1 final drive) in a **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (2-way, 4.11:1 ratio) differential, paired with **Mazdaspeed RX-2-specific CV axles** (custom-length, 300M steel, 32-spline) and a **Tilton 7.25" twin-disc clutch** (ceramic-metallic, 6 puck) for 500+ ft-lbs torque capacity.
estetica: **Veilside Fortune 03 widebody kit** (RX-2-specific, fiberglass, 3" fender flares) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** (3D-scanned from a Mazda RX-8 GT, 400mm overhang) and **Rocket Bunny rear diffuser** (polyurethane, 3-piece, 150mm ground clearance).

**Work Meister S1 3P wheels** (15x9 +15 front, 15x10 +20 rear, 5x114.3 PCD) with **Nitto NT01 tires** (225/50/15 front, 245/45/15 rear) and **D2 Racing coilovers** (32-way adjustable, 8kg/mm front/10kg/mm rear springs) for a 1.5" static drop with aggressive camber settings (-3° front, -2.5° rear).

**Custom rotary-themed livery** by **Rotary Aviation** (vinyl wrap, matte black base with **GReddy-inspired red/white rotary stripes** on the hood and fenders), paired with **Mazdaspeed RX-2 JDM-spec taillights** (LED, sequential turn signals) and a **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (vented, 50% weight reduction, 2x 80mm NACA ducts for intercooler airflow).
